title: Add option to emit flattened XML netlist
body:
This patch adds a `--xml-flat` option (to be used in conjunction or instead of `--xml-only`) that causes a version of the netlist to be emitted where the hierarchy has been flattened, with all modules, tasks and functions inlined. The result is a single TOP module and scope, under which the design's logic sits.

The flattened XML output can be used by a separate downstream tool to perform analsyis of the connectivity of the design, by observing the graph of dependencies between variable references.
